title: 目標達成の後に・我等が目指すは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spring comes, and with it the classic-year G1
races. Mejiro Ardan proposes that we set the
Japanese Derby as her ultimate goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Behind her proposal lies a powerful desire to
shine so brightly that she expels the shadow of
her legendary older sister. She hopes to leave her
own dazzling mark on the present, as Mejiro
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set the Aoba Sho as a preliminary race in the
hopes of increasing her chances, however little,
of winning the Japanese Derby. With our minds
made up, we start to make progress once again.
However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan has taken notice of the growing
success of Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno Muteki
during their classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After putting this out of mind, though, she
reaffirms that her primary goal is to outshine her
older sister's accomplishments, then refocuses on
the Aoba Sho...
